ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "organisation_uri" TEXT /* URI of the organization responsible for the project */,
  "organisation_label" TEXT /* Name of the organization responsible for the project */,
  "site_reference" TEXT /* Reference code for the site */,
  "previously_part_of" TEXT /* Reference to any previous site */,
  "site_name_address" TEXT /* Full address of the site */,
  "site_plan_url" TEXT /* URL to the site plan */,
  "coordinate_reference_system" TEXT /* Coordinate reference system used */,
  "geo_x" REAL /* Geographic X coordinate */,
  "geo_y" REAL /* Geographic Y coordinate */,
  "easting" INTEGER /* Easting coordinate */,
  "northing" INTEGER /* Northing coordinate */,
  "hectares" REAL /* Size of the site in hectares */,
  "ownership_status" TEXT /* Ownership status of the site */,
  "deliverable" TEXT /* Whether the site is deliverable */,
  "planning_status" TEXT /* Current planning status of the project */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of planning permission */,
  "permission_date" TEXT /* Date of planning permission */,
  "planning_history_url" TEXT /* URL to the planning history */,
  "proposed_for_pip" TEXT /* Whether the project is proposed for a Public Investment Program (PIP) */,
  "min_net_dwellings" INTEGER /* Minimum number of net dwellings */,
  "development_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the proposed development */,
  "non_housing_development" TEXT /* Description of non-housing development */,
  "part_2" TEXT /* Part 2 of the development (if applicable) */,
  "net_dwellings_range_from" INTEGER /* Range from for net dwellings */,
  "net_dwellings_range_to" INTEGER /* Range to for net dwellings */,
  "hazardous_substances" TEXT /* Presence of hazardous substances */,
  "site_information" TEXT /* Additional site information */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes related to the project */,
  "first_added_date" TEXT /* Date the project was first added to the system */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the project was last updated */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes and comments */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* A more user-friendly name for the project */,
  "project_start_date" TEXT /* The date when the project started */,
  "project_end_date" TEXT /* The expected or actual end date of the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., planning, construction, completed) */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Estimated or actual budget for the project */,
  "funding_sources" TEXT /* Information about the sources of funding */,
  "environmental_impact" TEXT /* Description of the environmental impact of the project */,
  "public_consultation" TEXT /* Information about public consultations held for the project */,
  "stakeholder_feedback" TEXT /* Summary of feedback from stakeholders */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the project */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_site_reference FOREIGN KEY ("site_reference") REFERENCES sites ("site_reference"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_organisation_uri FOREIGN KEY ("organisation_uri") REFERENCES organisations ("organisation_uri")
)

CREATE TABLE "organisations" (
  "organisation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "organisation_uri" TEXT /* URI of the organization */,
  "organisation_label" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "organisation_type" TEXT /* Type of organization (e.g., public, private, non-profit) */,
  "organisation_address" TEXT /* Address of the organization */,
  "organisation_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the organization */,
  "organisation_email" TEXT /* Email address of the organization */,
  "organisation_website" TEXT /* Website URL of the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organisation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_reference" TEXT /* Reference code for the site */,
  "site_name_address" TEXT /* Full address of the site */,
  "coordinate_reference_system" TEXT /* Coordinate reference system used */,
  "geo_x" REAL /* Geographic X coordinate */,
  "geo_y" REAL /* Geographic Y coordinate */,
  "easting" INTEGER /* Easting coordinate */,
  "northing" INTEGER /* Northing coordinate */,
  "hectares" REAL /* Size of the site in hectares */,
  "ownership_status" TEXT /* Ownership status of the site */,
  "site_history" TEXT /* Historical information about the site */,
  "site_condition" TEXT /* Current condition of the site (e.g., contaminated, clean) */,
  "site_accessibility" TEXT /* Information about the accessibility of the site */,
  "site_utilities" TEXT /* Information about the utilities available at the site */,
  "site_images" TEXT /* URLs to images of the site */,
  "site_documents" TEXT /* URLs to important documents related to the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "planning_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each planning permission */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the permission is for */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of planning permission */,
  "permission_date" TEXT /* Date of planning permission */,
  "permission_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions attached to the planning permission */,
  "permission_duration" TEXT /* Duration for which the permission is valid */,
  "permission_renewal_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission can be renewed */,
  "permission_documents" TEXT /* URLs to documents related to the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_planning_permissions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "planning_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each planning application */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the application is for */,
  "application_number" TEXT /* Number of the planning application */,
  "application_url" TEXT /* URL to the planning application */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date of the planning application */,
  "application_status" TEXT /* Status of the planning application */,
  "application_documents" TEXT /* URLs to documents related to the application */,
  "application_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the application */,
  "application_meetings" TEXT /* Information about meetings related to the application */,
  "application_decisions" TEXT /* Decisions made regarding the application */,
  "application_decision_date" TEXT /* Date when the decision was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_planning_applications_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
